manifest_status: FROZEN — G0 round-2 PASS (handover/audits/CODEX_MICRO_AUDIT_TB_18_PRE_H_VERDICT_R2_2026-05-05.md) + user explicit 'go' both received 2026-05-05; HEAD c9e0dc1 carries G0 CHALLENGE-resolved (assert_27 capsule.reason↔outcome consistency + comprehensive_arena helper parameterized + r2 evidence regenerated); M1 launch authorized.
ladder_stage_note: M1 = Full heldout subset per architect §B.9.3 (50-100 problems / n1 + n3 / all failures produce EvidenceCapsule / dashboard batch report). This manifest pins n1 / 50 problems first; an M1.n3 follow-up manifest will pin n=3 if n=1 baseline produces credible solve+halt distribution.

problem_set.problem_ids_source: experiments/minif2f_v4/combined50.txt (50 problems; 17 overlap with M0; 33 new)
problem_set.problem_ids_freeze_protocol: At batch start, copy combined50.txt into evidence dir (immutable copy) + record sha256; per-run records manifest_id + frozen_problems_sha256.

model.name: deepseek-chat
model.version_pin_note: DeepSeek does not publish stable model-version IDs; pin captured by batch start UTC. Drift recurrence handled via per-LLM-call budget tracker (atom A) — DegradedLLM halt on N consecutive trivial responses.

runtime.external_timeout_note: M1 uses architect §B.9.3 spec 600s external timeout (loosened from M0 retry's 120s). Rationale: M1 has 50 problems × 600s upper-bound = 30,000 wall-clock seconds (~8.3 hours) worst-case sequential; if all hit upper bound this batch becomes a network/budget loss but we keep the per-architect spec.
runtime.condition_note: n1 = run_swarm path with single agent (per architect M-ladder M1 spec). M1.n3 follow-up = same 50 problems + n=3 + new manifest.

seeds.boltzmann_seed_note: M1 does not exercise Boltzmann (single-agent); M2 will pin BOLTZMANN_SEED=12345 per TB-16.x.2.4 precedent

lean_environment.mathlib_commit_capture: captured at batch start via `lake exe cache get` state (mathlib commit hash recorded in genesis_payload.toml constitution_root.lean_runtime block + verified at preflight stage)

turingosv4_commit_note: HEAD at FROZEN-for-launch time = TB-18 G0 CHALLENGE-resolved (commit c9e0dc1; assert_27 stricter capsule.reason↔outcome check + comprehensive_arena helper parameterized + r2 evidence). Predecessor lineage: 0c3a5e1 (atom F SHIPPED) ← 15b662c (B-impl SHIPPED). M1 batch invoked from this commit; per anti_drift_contract, any HEAD change mid-batch INVALIDATES the run and requires a new manifest.
boltzmann_mode_note: M1: n_agents=1 (Boltzmann not exercised); price mask disabled.

evidence_packaging_policy.uncommitted_runs_record: each non-sampled run gets entry in handover/evidence/tb_18_minif2f_m1_2026-05-XX/EVIDENCE_INDEX.json with local_evidence_path

anti_drift_contract: Manifest is FROZEN at batch start. If any field changes mid-batch (e.g. model version drift, mathlib re-fetch, problem list rotation), batch is INVALIDATED and must restart with new manifest (new created_at_utc + new turingosv4_commit + new manifest_id). Drift detection: every Nth-problem checkpoint cross-checks model_version + mathlib_commit + turingosv4_commit; mismatch halts batch, records the drift event, requires new manifest before resume.
per_run_linking: Each problem run records `batch_manifest_id` in its EvidenceCapsule.batch_manifest_id field (atom A future-binding for canonical schema; today recorded as sidecar in evidence/<run>/M1_RUN_MANIFEST.json copy). Replay tooling cross-checks every run's batch_manifest_id matches the committed manifest.

g0_verdict_gate.veto_action: M1 BLOCKED until VETO resolved + re-audit
g0_verdict_gate.rationale: feedback_audit_after_evidence + charter §2 hard sequencing rule G0 BEFORE H

user_authorization_gate.authorization_pattern: per charter §2 non-blanket authority amendment, atom H invocation requires explicit user 'go' (G0 PASS alone is necessary but not sufficient)
user_authorization_gate.rationale: charter §2 amendment 2026-05-05 (architect ratification); user blanket auto-mode authority elapsed at TB-18 PROVISIONAL ship; TB-18.* follow-ups (B-impl, F) had ad-hoc autonomous authority for in-session 24h envelopes; M1 batch is 5-7d external compute envelope and crosses authority boundary
